title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
organizationDescription: Manage organization settings, currency, and timezone
agentDescription: Connect WhatsApp or Telegram to send receipts from your phone

general.title: General Settings
general.organizationNameDescription: This is the name of your organization.
general.deleteOrganizationDescription: Permanently delete your organization and all its data.

preferences.title: Display Preferences
preferences.description: Customize how the application looks and behaves
preferences.compactModeDescription: Use a more condensed layout with smaller spacing

team.title: Team Members
team.subtitle: Manage your team members and invitations

preferencesPage.title: Preferences
preferencesPage.description: Customize your display and application settings

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.description: Configure your alert and notification preferences

notificationsForm.emailDescription: Configure which email notifications you receive
notificationsForm.weeklyDigestDescription: Get a weekly summary of your financial activity
notificationsForm.lowBalanceAlertsDescription: Get notified when account balance is low
notificationsForm.syncErrorAlertsDescription: Get notified when bank sync fails
notificationsForm.lowBalanceThresholdDescription: Get alerted when any account balance falls below this amount
notificationsForm.highExpenseThresholdDescription: Get alerted when a single expense exceeds this amount
notificationsForm.alertTypesDescription: Choose which types of alerts you receive by email
notificationsForm.emailHighSpendDescription: Get emailed when monthly spend in a category exceeds your threshold
notificationsForm.emailRunwayCriticalDescription: Get emailed when your cash runway drops below your threshold
notificationsForm.emailUnusualActivityDescription: Get emailed when a single expense is unusually high for its category
notificationsForm.runwayThresholdDescription: Alert when runway falls below this number of months
notificationsForm.unusualMultiplierDescription: Alert when an expense is this many times the category average (e.g., 2 = 2x average)
